calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Continued To Dec-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Or Dismiss Proceedings
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open Court, Counsel for Defense, Mr. Giamela appears via Zoom with Court Reporter Jane Hong. Counsel states he is not contesting but has a clarification for the court. After clerk's check in, counsel states he has resolved the issue with the other side and will not need the Court's assistance.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Wolfgang Puck Catering and Events, LLC's motion to compel arbitration and stay or dismiss proceedings is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, To Produce Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rachel Hallam, Esq. 510-688-8119 Kletter Law for Plaintiff.
Lonnie Giamela, Esq. 213-330-4454 Fisher Phillips for Defendant.
Court reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, 925-360-6065, chreporter@comcast.net

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Ms. Hallman agrees with the TR.
Mr. Giamela contests and presents arguments.
Court comments and poses questions.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Joseph Roldan's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, To Produce Documents, And For Sanctions.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
